BookDocument.ArticleTitle: BRCA1- and BRCA2-Associated Hereditary Breast and Ovarian Cancer

Abstract.AbstractText: The diagnosis is established in a proband by identification of a heterozygous pathogenic variant in BRCA1 or BRCA2.
Consider prophylactic bilateral mastectomy and risk-reducing salpingo-oophorectomy based on individual risk assessment.
BRCA1- and BRCA2-associated hereditary breast and ovarian cancer is inherited in an autosomal dominant manner with variable expression.
